title: Jackie's Decorative Blocks Mod
description: A mod adding decorative blocks. 1 of the blocks is a sofa! These decorative blocks help your gameplay feel more cozy like a cabin in the winter with a fireplace.
body:
# Deprecation Notice
versions for neoforge are deprecated please don't ask for me to port my mods as they are never going to be for neoforge or forge only fabric and quilt.

# 1.21.8 Version Contents
**Experiments**
## The blocks in game **_DO NOT_** have a **_LANG FILE_**

## Sorina Wood Type:

Sorina Wood has a plank variant but no log or leaves **_DO NOT ASK FOR A SURVIVAL FRIENDLY WAY WAY TO GET IT OR NEW VARIANTS_**.

## Burgentri:

Burgentri is a wood type with a door, and plank variants, and is very similar to that of acacia and jungle wood. And has no log or leaves block of course.

## Marble Block Set:

Marble is a new block (Not obtainable in Survival) with tiles, pillar, etc. variants all useable and good looking too.

# Additions
**SOFA CHAIR, POT, & SPRUCE FRAMED GLASS**
## Sofa Chair
The Sofa Chair is a decorative block without seatablity.
## The Roman Pot
The Pot Block expands on archaeology by looking like an old artifact.
## Spruce Framed Glass (Window Block)
The Spruce Framed Glass is very antique, it looks cool compared to normal glass.
## Archaeology Site Protector Fence Block
These Blocks are very good for decoration at an archaeology site same with the pots.
## Fireplace
The Fireplace block is still in the debug model phase, but looks great for any home.
## Bamboo Table
A Bamboo Table has unstripped bamboo and tinted glass textures on it which looks awesome.
## Chair
The Chair Block while unfunctional works well.
## Cup of Coffee
There is a placeable varient and an item varient for map making and roleplaying.
## Updates
Notice: I will not be updating often.
